# BP-135 variant negative: a GORM handler creates a new session first.
lang: go
file: BP-135-variant-safe.go
variant: gorm-global-first-session
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"net/http"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct{}

func getUser(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *gorm.DB) {
	var user User
	if err := db.Session(&gorm.Session{}).First(&user).Error; err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, gorm.ErrRecordNotFound) {
			http.NotFound(w, r)
			return
		}
		http.Error(w, "query failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
	}
}
